title: Regression: 1.2.0: 'ps --size' crashes
body:
```
$ podman run alpine date
[ok]
$ podman ps --size
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x28 pc=0x556486a3432a]
[...and many more pages of stacktrace]
```
nonroot only, and only if there's at least one container (not necessarily running). Does not fail after `podman rm -a`.

Baffling and unexpected. Probably a showstopper.

podman-1.2.0-2.git3bd528e.fc29.x86_64

comments.body:
the c.runtime.store is nil
```
(dlv) p c.runtime.store
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/storage.Store nil
```
this one should be fixed with the refactoring.  Please reopen if it is still happeing
@giuseppe I actually landed a separate fix that made this an error - need to remove that now that single userns is merged
